lot: Emergency Reconstruction of Ssezibwa Bridge (1.6km) along Kalagi – Kayunga Road under Design and Build
contractor: Ms Dynaco Ltd Consultant Professional Engineering Consultants
status: Consultancy Contract was signed on 17th  May 2024; Effective date was 10th  June 2024. Works Contract was signed on 3rd May 2024; Commencement date was 20th June 2024. Original completion 20 December 2025 Revised Completion 16 April 2026. (EoT 177days). Physical progress stands at 62% against a baseline programme that is 97.7% elapsed (679/695 days); Financial progress is at 60% of contract value. Milestones so far Revised Draft Detailed Design Report approved. The bridge superstructure is substantially complete (piling, abutments, pier, arch ribs, deck and walkway all cast); current site activity is focused on road embankment earthworks (gravel end-tipping in widening sections). All four box culverts are constructed; gabion works at Km 1+275 and diversion maintenance are planned for May 2026.

lot: Civil Works for Emergency Restoration Of Karuma Bridge Along Kampala-Gulu Road

Installation of speed humps and rumbles Completed (100%) Road marking Completed (100%) Installation of expansion joints 100% complete. Solar Light Installation 100% complete Stone pitching 100% complete Sand Blasting, undercoat paint and intermediate coat on steel elements in progress 100% complete. Construction of Gabions 98% complete. The physical progress of works as of September 2025 is 98.8% against a planned progress of 100% while the time progress is at 100%. The bridge was opened to traffic on 20th December 2024. Closed in March 2025 and re-opened on 14 April 2025 after installation of expansion joints
